title: Buttery Glassy-Jelly Wholesome Puy-lentils Bowl
description: An adventurous Tunisian dish featuring glassy-jelly puy-lentils in a buttery blend of flavors and textures, perfect as an accompaniment to any meal.
instructions: Rinse and pick out any debris from the lentils.
In a large pot, combine lentils with water. Bring to a boil then reduce heat to low, cover and simmer for about 45 minutes or until tender.
Meanwhile, in a blender, puree onion, garlic, coconut milk, butter, salt, and dill (if using) into a smooth consistency. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
When the lentils are done, mix them with the blended mixture and serve hot.
Optional: Garnish with fresh herbs like parsley or cilantro for extra color and flavor.
